prompt: Crie um design system dark mode completo com tokens para um app React

assertions.name: asks-vibe-or-confirms-style
assertions.description: Confirms dark mode approach and brand direction before coding

assertions.name: generates-design-tokens-first
assertions.description: Generates CSS custom properties and Tailwind config as first output

assertions.name: dark-mode-color-tokens
assertions.description: Defines complete dark mode palette: background, surface, border, text, accent

assertions.name: typography-scale
assertions.description: Defines typography scale with at least 6 size steps

assertions.name: spacing-system
assertions.description: Defines spacing scale based on 4px or 8px multiplier

assertions.name: component-specs
assertions.description: Includes specs for at least 3 components using the tokens

note: Run Skill Creator eval cycle to score assertions
